mapper.select: SELECT c.item_id, c.in_stock, c.quantity, c.product_id, c.list_price, i.ATTR1 AS attr1, i.ATTR2 AS attr2, i.ATTR3 AS attr3, i.ATTR4 AS attr4, i.ATTR5 AS attr5, p.name, p.description FROM cart c JOIN item i ON c.item_id = i.ITEMID JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.PRODUCTID WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.item_id, c.in_stock, c.quantity, c.product_id, c.list_price, i.ATTR1 AS attr1, i.ATTR2 AS attr2, i.ATTR3 AS attr3, i.ATTR4 AS attr4, i.ATTR5 AS attr5, p.name, p.description FROM cart c JOIN item i ON c.item_id = i.ITEMID JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.PRODUCTID WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, item_id, product_id, description, in_stock, quantity, list_price) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.product.description}, #{inStock}, #{quantity}, #{item.listPrice} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND item_id = #{itemId}
